meta.description: Unavailable response regression fixture (TEST-020). 32 RESPOND_UNAVAILABLE scenarios covering: no alternatives, one alternative, two alternatives, D-1 past alternative, D+1 future alternative, requested date in past, weekend enquiries, corporate/social/agency audiences, lunch/dinner/brunch meal periods, and capacity-unsuitable alternatives.

scenarios.description: RESPOND_UNAVAILABLE — social guest, dinner, no alternatives available
scenarios.draft_text: Dear Sarah, thank you for your message. Unfortunately we are unable to accommodate your event on Friday 19 June 2026 for dinner. We hope to welcome you on another occasion. Kind regards, Events Team

scenarios.description: RESPOND_UNAVAILABLE — corporate guest, dinner, no alternatives available
scenarios.draft_text: Dear Mr Clarke, thank you for your enquiry. Unfortunately we are unable to accommodate your corporate dinner on Friday 19 June 2026. We hope to be of assistance on another occasion. Best regards, Events Team

scenarios.description: RESPOND_UNAVAILABLE — agency guest, dinner, no alternatives available
scenarios.draft_text: Dear Sophie, thank you for reaching out on behalf of your client. Unfortunately we are unable to accommodate your event on Friday 19 June 2026. We will be in touch if a slot becomes available. Kind regards, Events Team

scenarios.description: RESPOND_UNAVAILABLE — social guest, lunch, no alternatives available
scenarios.draft_text: Dear Alice, thank you for getting in touch. Unfortunately we are unable to accommodate your lunch on Friday 19 June 2026. We hope to welcome you soon. Warm regards, Events Team
